steps.title: Substitute the input
steps.content:
The function gives an output after replacing $x$ with the requested input. Since the question asks for $f(9)$, use $9$ in place of $x$.
$$f(9)=63-4(9)$$

steps.title: Evaluate the expression
steps.content:
Compute the multiplication first, then subtract from $63$ to get the function value.
$$f(9)=63-36=27$$
The answer is B.
